The '''True Victory Party''' was a political party of [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] who tried to continue the [[ar'krai]] against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==History==
The party was led by [[Reh'mwa]] around [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] arranged for the leaders of the party's [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] branch to be killed by [[Lumiya]] and [[Alema Rar]], causing the Bothans to side with the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]] in the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
